prompt:
A clean modern wellness-brand infographic poster on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Inspired by the side-panel infographic style of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (see provided reference image — chevron callout strips with icons + bold labels, accented in TEAL/CYAN and GOLD/YELLOW with deep ink-black type).

Topic: '6 BENEFITS OF SEA MOSS' — a single-page infographic explaining the key health benefits.

LAYOUT:
  • TOP — header block: small DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies brand lockup (small teal+gold logo treatment, brand-style typography matching the jar), centered. Below it, a single bold ALL-CAPS headline in deep ink-black: '6 KEY BENEFITS OF SEA MOSS'. A thin gold horizontal rule underneath.
  • MIDDLE — 6 benefit modules arranged in a clean 2-COLUMN × 3-ROW GRID. Each module is a small chevron-shaped callout (matching the jar's side-panel chevron strip style) on a soft warm-gray rounded panel. Each chevron contains:
     ・ a small flat single-color TEAL/CYAN line icon (representing the benefit)
     ・ a bold ALL-CAPS short label in deep ink-black (e.g. 'IMMUNE SUPPORT')
     ・ one sub-line of light-grey body text (e.g. 'Rich in antioxidants and vitamin C')
  The 6 benefits: IMMUNE SUPPORT (shield icon), THYROID FUNCTION (small thyroid/gland icon), GUT HEALTH (intestine/seedling icon), SKIN GLOW (sparkle/water-drop icon), ENERGY + STAMINA (lightning bolt icon), MINERAL POWERHOUSE (mineral crystal icon).
  • BOTTOM — small footer strip: tiny disclaimer text 'These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.' in light gray, centered. Below it, a small product reference: a tiny rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar from the provided reference, with a thin gold accent rule.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN (matching the jar's accent), warm GOLD/YELLOW (matching the jar's lid + headline), deep INK-BLACK for body type, soft warm-gray for sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines and labels (matching the 'DIALED' / 'SEA MOSS' lettering on the jar), clean modern sans-serif for body text. NO script fonts.
  • Icons: flat outlined single-color teal/cyan, consistent stroke weight, modern minimal.
  • Spacing: generous breathing room, NOT cramped.
  • Style: editorial wellness-brand infographic — Athletic Greens / Hims / Goop product-page aesthetic. Clean, premium, scannable.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, in proper English, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the SECOND provided image (jar product photo) for brand color/type/icon-style language and the small product rendering in the footer.
